items.title: It's NBA draft night! It's a two-day event for the third straight year, both rounds held at Barclays Center.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
It's NBA draft night! It's a two-day event for the third straight year, both rounds held at Barclays Center.

Pacers enter the night without a pick in either round. They have 14 players under contract for 2026-27, but only 11 fully guaranteed.

items.title: Go ahead and second-screen CBS Sports HQ tonight during the NBA Draft. We’ll have a lot of intel, fresh takes, deep analysis and promise to have some fun as well. Also won’t praise EVERY single pick, I promise. We’re live now and for the next 4+ hours.

items.author: dan favale
items.body_excerpt:
for the sake of receipts, my top 7 board:

1. AJ Dybantsa
2. Darryn Peterson
3. Cam Boozer
4. Mikel Brown Jr.
5. Keaton Wagler
6. Caleb Wilson 
7. Brayden Burries

like more than most: Dailyn Swain, Joshua Jefferson, Trevon Brazile

lower on more than most: Acuff, Flemings, Steinbach, Morez Johnson

items.title: Sorry, I wasn't clear — I was saying that I understand when there's reporting to *follow up* on signals over a star player, not that I've seen or heard any indications of smoke RE: Ant.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt:
Sorry, I wasn't clear — I was saying that I understand when there's reporting to *follow up* on signals over a star player, not that I've seen or heard any indications of smoke RE: Ant.

As far as the Ant speculation: I think folks saw "they're salary-dumping Julius?" and made a very, very big leap.
